title: Misleading Count of Leading Ones in Binary Representation

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.outputFormat: Count of leading ones in the binary representation of n.

examples.explanation: Explanation 7 has binary representation 111 so count of leading ones is 1
Explanation 10 has binary representation 1010 so count of leading ones is 0

editorial.title: Misleading Count of Leading Ones in Binary Representation
